title: Rename app to Dard-e-munasif and apply custom logo across branding

requirements.summary: Update the app name from 'Spiritual Hub' to 'Dard-e-munasif' in all visible branding locations
acceptanceCriteria: The navbar/header displays 'Dard-e-munasif' as the app name
No instance of 'Spiritual Hub' remains visible in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag from 'Spiritual Hub' to 'Dard-e-munasif' to change the browser tab title
Replace 'Spiritual Hub' text in the header/navbar with 'Dard-e-munasif'

requirements.summary: Replace the current logo/icon with the uploaded circular black & white logo image in navbar, header, and favicon
acceptanceCriteria: The circular black & white logo appears in the navbar/header next to the app name
The favicon in the browser tab uses the same logo image
The logo renders correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Add a <link rel="icon"> tag in the <head> section pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png to set the favicon

Add an element displaying the circular logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png in the header/navbar next to the app name, styled as a circular image with appropriate sizing for mobile and desktop viewports
